description_long: This is a stylized sword with a short, broad blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is colored in shades of red and pink, with several jagged notches along one edge, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. The hilt features a wide, angular guard with a central green gem-like accent, and the handle is faceted, transitioning from a reddish hue at the top to a darker, brownish tone at the base. The overall design is geometric and somewhat fantastical, with a matte finish and no visible engravings or intricate details. The sword appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with possible gemstone or crystal elements in the guard. Its proportions suggest it is intended for one-handed use, suitable for display or as a prop in an urban fantasy setting.
description: A stylized, short sword with a jagged red blade, angular guard with a green gem, and a faceted handle in reddish-brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full jagged blade, wide angular guard, and central green gem.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the faceted, polygonal handle.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the notched blade and guard visible but less detail on the gem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the angular handle structure.
attribute_handle_design: faceted, straight, polygonal, reddish-brown, no visible grip texture
